name: Real Estate
heroSub: Real estate sales teams across India lose lakhs every week to slow follow-up and no-priority-system. Leadkaun fixes that in 60 minutes.

painPoints.title: Property enquiries have a 47-minute window
painPoints.body: Leads contacted within 47 minutes of enquiry are 5× more likely to convert. Most teams call back in 4+ hours — or not at all.

painPoints.title: One missed site visit = ₹5–₹50L lost
painPoints.body: Property deals are high-value and emotion-driven. A cold lead doesn't just not convert — they go to a competitor who called first.

painPoints.title: Reps call the new enquiries. Forget the warm ones.
painPoints.body: Without a queue, reps call the freshest lead. But a Grade B lead that replied to a WhatsApp 2 days ago is far more likely to close than a cold new enquiry.

howItHelps: Every property enquiry gets Grade A–F based on project fit, location match, and engagement
Priority Queue surfaces the leads most likely to convert TODAY — not just the newest ones
3-tap logging: rep marks call outcome, WhatsApp stage, and site visit booking in under 10 seconds
Missed Opportunity Engine shows every stale enquiry with ₹ value — manager sees per-rep accountability
Morning Brief: '4 Grade A enquiries need callback. ₹12L in site visits at risk today'

proofQuote.text: 200+ enquiries/month, converting 3–4%. After Leadkaun: 8% in 6 weeks. ₹38L additional revenue.
proofQuote.name: Priya S.

proofStat: 5× conversion uplift when Grade A enquiries are contacted within 47 minutes

faqs.q: Does Leadkaun integrate with 99acres / MagicBricks?
faqs.a: Not natively in Phase 1 — export their leads to a Google Sheet, Leadkaun pulls from the sheet every 5 minutes.

faqs.q: Can multiple agents share one enquiry?
faqs.a: Yes — assignment rules handle round-robin or manual handoffs; broker splits are logged.

faqs.q: Can we set different ICPs per project?
faqs.a: Yes, on Growth tier. Luxury vs affordable projects can have independent weights.

faqs.q: Does it track site visit outcomes?
faqs.a: Yes — site visit is a stage in the built-in CRM with booked/no-show/follow-up outcomes.

faqs.q: What if a broker closes the deal outside Leadkaun?
faqs.a: Log it as 'closed-external' with commission tagged; the engine still attributes the originating enquiry.

keywords: lead management software for real estate india
real estate sales tracking software india

name: EdTech
painH1: Score and Prioritise Student Enquiries Before They Go Cold.
heroSub: EdTech admissions teams across India run on WhatsApp, long parent threads, and seasonal cycles. Leadkaun grades every enquiry, tracks every reply, and tells your counsellor which 8 parents to call first.

painPoints.title: 400 enquiries, one counsellor
painPoints.body: Admissions counsellors carry 200–500 leads each. With no triage, 30 minutes every morning goes to deciding who to call first — instead of calling.

painPoints.title: Parent threads drop mid-conversation
painPoints.body: Parent says 'discuss with my spouse', disappears, and nobody follows up at the right moment. 80% of qualified conversations move to WhatsApp — most CRMs don't see any of it.

painPoints.title: Admissions cycles are ₹-sensitive
painPoints.body: A Grade A lead in April is worthless in September. Counsellors who miss the 5-day follow-up window lose a full year's fee (₹50k–₹5L) per missed enrolment.

howItHelps: Every enquiry is graded A–F based on course fit, programme match, and engagement signals from both student and parent
3-tap WhatsApp logging captures every parent reply — stage, intent, outcome — feeding the Intent Score in real time
Priority Queue surfaces the Grade A parents who replied overnight, so the first call by 11 AM hits the hot leads
Intent decay respects admissions cycles: a silent Grade A drops to Grade B over a week, so the queue stays fresh
Morning Brief: '8 Grade A enquiries replied overnight. ₹6L in admissions at risk if not called by 11 AM'

proofQuote.text: Counsellor morning triage dropped from 30 min to 2. We closed 12 more admissions in April because every counsellor knew exactly which Grade A parent to call at 9 AM.
proofQuote.name: Rajesh M.

proofStat: Counsellor productivity improves 2–3× when leads are pre-ranked vs triaged manually

faqs.q: Does it handle parent + student dual thread?
faqs.a: Yes — the lead record has primary + secondary contacts, and WhatsApp tracking logs who replied when.

faqs.q: Can we set different scoring per course?
faqs.a: Yes, on Growth tier. Course-level ICP weights let you tune for engineering vs arts vs PG.

faqs.q: Does it integrate with our LMS / SIS?
faqs.a: Not in Phase 1. Export leads to CSV for the SIS; Leadkaun owns the enquiry-to-enrolment funnel only.

faqs.q: What about offline / walk-in admissions?
faqs.a: Manual entry form takes 15 seconds; the lead enters the queue immediately.

faqs.q: How does it handle seasonality?
faqs.a: Intent decay rates are configurable per admissions cycle; default India EdTech cycle supported.

name: BFSI
painH1: BFSI Sales, in ₹ — Audit Trail, Assignment, Accountability.
heroSub: Insurance branch managers, NBFC sales heads, and wealth RMs across India run regulated sales with compliance pressure and agent-network complexity. Leadkaun gives you grading, assignment, audit trail, and ₹-at-risk — in 60 minutes.

painPoints.title: Compliance trail gaps at audit
painPoints.body: A rep's 'I called them last week' doesn't show up in the system — and at renewal or claim time, that gap becomes a regulator-visible audit risk.

painPoints.title: Same lead, two agents, one dispute
painPoints.body: Aggregator-sourced insurance leads often get assigned twice across product lines. Commission conflicts eat 10–15% of an agent's month.

painPoints.title: Renewals slip unnoticed
painPoints.body: Existing policyholders due for renewal or cross-sell aren't flagged until after they lapse. Every lapsed policy is ₹8k–₹1L of premium walking out.

howItHelps: Per-product ICP templates — term, health, motor, loans — score each lead by the right criteria for its product line
Assignment rules by product × geography keep health leads out of a motor agent's queue, eliminating attribution disputes
Every call, WhatsApp, and email is logged with a timestamp and exported on demand for IRDAI / RBI audit preparation
Renewal and cross-sell dates live on the lead record — the Missed Opportunity Engine surfaces them with ₹ value 30 days before lapse
Branch Manager Morning Brief: '12 Grade A leads unassigned. ₹4L premium at risk today'

proofQuote.text: Agent-attribution disputes dropped 80% in two months. Our audit review used to take three days pulling records. Now it's three hours — one export from Leadkaun.
proofQuote.name: Vikram N.

proofStat: 30–40% of insurance leads are never contacted within SLA; Leadkaun's SLA alerting closes this gap

faqs.q: Is the data compliant with IRDAI / RBI audit requirements?
faqs.a: Row-Level Security at DB level; full audit trail per lead; one-click export. Talk to us for specific regulator checklists.

faqs.q: Can we track renewals + upsell, not just new business?
faqs.a: Lead records carry renewal dates; the Missed Opportunity Engine surfaces upcoming renewals as opportunities.

faqs.q: How is attribution handled across agents?
faqs.a: First-contact attribution with a configurable 'assisted' credit model.

faqs.q: Does it work with aggregator-sourced leads?
faqs.a: Yes — CSV / Google Sheet ingestion from PolicyBazaar/BankBazaar exports.

faqs.q: Does it support bancassurance cross-sell?
faqs.a: Yes — same lead can appear in multiple product queues with clear ownership.

name: Manufacturing
painH1: Industrial Sales, Without Losing Quotes in the 90-Day Cycle.
heroSub: Manufacturing B2B teams live with long cycles, multi-stakeholder threads, field-rep travel, and quote-revision loops. Leadkaun scores every lead, holds the thread across 180 days, and surfaces stalled quotes in ₹ before they go to a competitor.

painPoints.title: Quote sent. Silence. Deal lost.
painPoints.body: 40% of B2B industrial quotes never receive a follow-up within the buyer's SLA. The vendor who follows up within 24 hours wins 60% of the time.

painPoints.title: Multi-stakeholder thread loss
painPoints.body: Procurement asked for a quote. Finance is evaluating. Engineering wants a sample. Three conversations, one deal — and nobody on the sales side sees the full thread.

painPoints.title: 90-day cycles, 30-day memory
painPoints.body: An engineered goods cycle runs 90+ days. The buying signal from day 15 is forgotten by day 45. Field reps come back with notes in their head that never get logged.

howItHelps: Intent Score tracks signals across a 90–180 day cycle with slow decay — a quote sent on day 15 still influences the lead's grade on day 60
Follow-up cadence defaults are long-B2B-aware: Grade A gets weekly touches, not daily spam
Mobile-optimised 3-tap logging works on patchy 3G — field reps log a 30-minute factory meeting in 10 seconds
Quote objects on the lead record carry value, validity, and next-touch date — Missed Opportunity Engine surfaces ₹ at risk per open quote
Distributor attribution with commission splits — no more credit disputes when a dealer closes an inside-sales-sourced deal

proofQuote.text: Our sales cycle dropped from 95 days to 62 because reps stopped losing the thread between quote and close. ₹1.4Cr of pipeline that would have stalled actually closed.
proofQuote.name: Suresh K.

proofStat: 40% of industrial B2B quotes never receive a follow-up within SLA; first to re-engage wins ~60% of the time

faqs.q: Does it handle quote tracking?
faqs.a: Lead record has a quote object with value, status, and follow-up schedule.

faqs.q: How does it work with field reps on patchy mobile data?
faqs.a: Mobile-optimised logging works offline; syncs when connectivity returns.

faqs.q: Can we attribute to distributors?
faqs.a: Yes, with configurable commission splits.

faqs.q: Does it integrate with our ERP (SAP, Tally, Zoho Books)?
faqs.a: Not in Phase 1. Export leads to CSV; ERP integration on roadmap.

faqs.q: Can multiple team members collaborate on one lead?
faqs.a: Yes — lead notes, activity timeline, and assignment support multi-rep collaboration.

keywords: b2b lead management software india manufacturing

name: Healthcare
painH1: Healthcare Sales, Without Losing Patients Between Visits.
heroSub: Diagnostic chains, clinic groups, health-package sales teams, and pharma field reps run on relationships and repeat visits. Leadkaun grades, tracks, and surfaces missed revenue — with the compliance trail and DND handling Indian healthcare requires.

painPoints.title: Corporate tie-up leads get lost
painPoints.body: HR sends 200 employee numbers for a health check. Reps can't triage who's a Grade A vs. just HR paperwork. 40% go cold without a callback in 48 hours.

painPoints.title: Return patients vanish between visits
painPoints.body: A patient bought a basic panel last month and is ready for an advanced one. Nobody remembers. ₹3k–₹30k of LTV walks out to another diagnostic chain.

painPoints.title: Doctor referral attribution is guesswork
painPoints.body: Referring doctors expect a monthly report showing how their referrals converted. Extracting that from 3 tools + WhatsApp threads takes a full day per month.

howItHelps: Patient records double as lead records — repeat-visit continuity with LTV tracking and upsell readiness signals
Referring-doctor source attribution is baked in — every referred patient is tagged, and monthly doctor reports auto-generate
Corporate HR tie-ups supported as a business_type — bulk leads triaged by appointment urgency and package value
WhatsApp tracking logs appointment confirmations, report-delivery replies, and follow-up requests
Compliance-ready: every signal is timestamped, every contact is audit-exportable — DND flags respected

proofQuote.text: Corporate tie-up revenue jumped ₹6L in the first month. Every HR referral now gets called within 24 hours, not 4 days later. Our referring doctors finally get a real monthly report.
proofQuote.name: Dr. Meera T.

proofStat: 40% of health-package leads never get a follow-up call within 24 hours

faqs.q: Is health data stored securely?

faqs.q: Does it integrate with our HIS (Hospital Info System)?

faqs.q: Can we run appointment reminders?
faqs.a: Yes — follow-up engine includes appointment-due reminder type.

name: SaaS
heroSub: Indian B2B SaaS teams run trial-to-paid, PLG-to-sales handoff, and expansion motions — usually on three different tools. Leadkaun unifies the grade, the queue, and the ₹ at risk across every motion.

painPoints.title: Trials expire before anyone calls
painPoints.body: User signs up, tries for 2 days, goes silent. No one from sales reaches out. Trial expires. Churn happens before the sales cycle begins. 60% of self-serve trials follow this shape.

painPoints.title: Expansion signals rot in product data
painPoints.body: An existing customer just added 5 seats, hit an API limit, and invited a new department. All expansion-ready signals. Nobody on the sales team sees any of it.

painPoints.title: Content-spike chaos
painPoints.body: A viral LinkedIn post drops 400 trial signups in a day. Sales has no triage. 350 go cold over the next week. Six figures of ARR walks away.

howItHelps: Trial signups ingested via webhook, CSV, or Google Sheet — graded A–F by company size, stack signals, and role the moment they arrive
Intent decay tuned for SaaS: a trial user silent for 10 days is a strong negative signal; someone who invited 3 teammates is a Grade A spike
Expansion-opportunity detection flags existing customers with usage, role-add, or seat-limit signals as separate lead type
Morning Brief: '12 trial users hit day-7 without a sales call. ₹3.2L ARR at risk — Priya owns 8, Rajesh owns 4'
Multi-seat deal threading: an SDR's initial contact flows to an AE's closing thread without losing context

proofQuote.text: We stopped losing trials to forgotten follow-ups. Trial-to-paid went from 22% to 34% in 60 days — Leadkaun surfaces the Grade A trials on day 1, not day 10.
proofQuote.name: Karthik P.

proofStat: B2B SaaS self-serve trials convert 4× better when contacted by human within 72 hours vs. left silent

faqs.q: Does it integrate with our trial signup flow?
faqs.a: Webhook or CSV; we'll publish a SaaS-specific onboarding guide.

faqs.q: How does it handle PLG self-upgrade events?
faqs.a: Trigger a 'self-upgrade' signal manually or via API; scoring surfaces the user for expansion conversations.

faqs.a: Lead record supports primary + associated contacts; account-level roll-ups available.

faqs.a: Product-level ICP and pipeline per product.
